queries.question: Can you show the name and id of the main actress with the most films?
queries.sql: SELECT Actress.id, Actress.Fullname FROM Actress JOIN Movie ON Actress.id = Movie.LeadActressId GROUP BY Actress.id, Actress.Fullname HAVING COUNT(Movie.id) = (SELECT MAX(MovieCount) FROm (SELECT Count(Movie.id) AS MovieCount FROM Actress JOIN Movie ON Actress.id = Movie.LeadActressId GROUP BY Actress.id, Actress.Fullname))
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): actress(es) with most lead roles; nested MAX(COUNT) + value-join Movie.LeadActre

queries.question: Give me the name of a film with the oldest lead actor.
queries.sql: Select Title, Fullname FROM Movie JOIN Actor on Actor.id = Movie.LeadActorId ORDER BY DateOfBirth ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?fullname WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?movie p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?movie p:Title ?title .
  ?actor p:name ?fullname .
  ?actor p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?dateofbirth_o)
LIMIT 1
queries.note: non-deterministic gold: ORDER BY DateOfBirth ASC LIMIT 1 with a tie (Tom Cruise, DOB 1962-07-03, leads 2 movies) -> arbitrary single row

queries.question: What film has the oldest lead actress?
queries.sql: Select Title, Fullname FROM Movie JOIN Actress on Actress.id = Movie.LeadActressId ORDER BY DateOfBirth ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?fullname WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?actress a :Actress .
  ?movie p:hasActress ?actress .
  ?movie p:Title ?title .
  ?actress p:name ?fullname .
  ?actress p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?dateofbirth_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Can you show the name and id of the main actor with the most films and also the name and id of the actress with the most films?
queries.sql: SELECT Actor.id, Actor.Fullname FROM Actor JOIN Movie ON Actor.id = Movie.LeadActorId GROUP BY Actor.id, Actor.Fullname HAVING COUNT(Movie.id) = (SELECT MAX(MovieCount) FROm (SELECT Count(Movie.id) AS MovieCount FROM Actor JOIN Movie ON Actor.id = Movie.LeadActorId GROUP BY Actor.id, Actor.Fullname)) UNION SELECT Actress.id, Actress.Fullname FROM Actress JOIN Movie ON Actress.id = Movie.LeadActressId GROUP BY Actress.id, Actress.Fullname HAVING COUNT(Movie.id) = (SELECT MAX(MovieCount) FROm (SELECT Count(Movie.id) AS MovieCount FROM Actress JOIN Movie ON Actress.id = Movie.LeadActressId GROUP BY Actress.id, Actress.Fullname))
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): actors AND actresses with most lead roles (UNION of the two most-roles queries)

queries.question: Can you show the name and id of the main actor with the most films?
queries.sql: SELECT Actor.id, Actor.Fullname FROM Actor JOIN Movie ON Actor.id = Movie.LeadActorId GROUP BY Actor.id, Actor.Fullname HAVING COUNT(Movie.id) = (SELECT MAX(MovieCount) FROm (SELECT Count(Movie.id) AS MovieCount FROM Actor JOIN Movie ON Actor.id = Movie.LeadActorId GROUP BY Actor.id, Actor.Fullname))
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): actor(s) with most lead roles

queries.question: Give me the name of a film with the oldest lead actor. What film has the oldest lead actress?
queries.sql: Select Title, Actor.Fullname, Actress.Fullname FROM Movie JOIN Actor on Actor.id = Movie.LeadActorId JOIN Actress on Actress.id = Movie.LeadActressId ORDER BY Actor.DateOfBirth, Actress.DateOfBirth ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?fullname ?fullname2 WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?movie p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?actress a :Actress .
  ?movie p:hasActress ?actress .
  ?movie p:Title ?title .
  ?actor p:name ?fullname .
  ?actress p:name ?fullname2 .
  ?actor p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
  ?actress p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o2 .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?dateofbirth_o) ASC(?dateofbirth_o2)
LIMIT 1
